title: 12PCS Christmas Bows for Tree Wreath Decorations, 5 Inch Glitter Christmas Wreath Bow Sequin Bow, Pink Bows
features: You'll receive 12 Pieces of glitter ribbon bows, red bows looks shiny, lovely and nice, can make your Christmas tree become more attractive and charming.
Christmas Glitter Bow measures approx. 12cm x 14cm / 4.7 x 5.5inch. Perfect for crafting, nice size for Xmas decorations.
The Glitter Christmas Bows are made of high quality foam cotton, not east to deform. Safe and odorless and with good shape.
Each Glitter Christmas Bows coming with a twisted tie, which is easily attached to your Christmas gifts.
Red Christmas Bows with glitter sequin on the surface, perfect for Christmas tree and indoor outdoor home decoration. Also can be used to decorate Christmas wreath garland, Christmas gift box.
